title: permission-set-architect inputs
description: Typed inputs for the permission-set-architect runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: live-org probe is mandatory in both modes Required column: 'yes'.
target_org_alias.example: live-org probe is mandatory in both modes

persona.description: Example from AGENT.md: "SDR in North America, works Leads + Opportunities, cannot export, light reporting" Required column: 'design-mode only'.
persona.example: "SDR in North America, works Leads + Opportunities, cannot export, light reporting"

audit_scope.description: Example from AGENT.md: `org` | `psg:<PSG_Name>` | `ps:<PS_Name>` | `user:<username>` Required column: 'audit-mode only'.

existing_psg.description: Example from AGENT.md: if extending an existing PSG, pass its name Required column: 'no (design)'.
existing_psg.example: if extending an existing PSG, pass its name
